ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic variant */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the variant is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "reference_sequence" TEXT /* Reference sequence at the variant location */,
  "alternate_sequence" TEXT /* Alternate sequence at the variant location */,
  "genome_assembly" TEXT /* Genome assembly used for the variant */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant */,
  "variant_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interpretations" (
  "interpretation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interpretation */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic variant interpreted */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition associated with the variant */,
  "interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the variant's significance */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the interpretation was submitted */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter */,
  "interpretation_version" INTEGER /* Version of the interpretation */,
  "criteria_used" TEXT /* Criteria used for the interpretation */,
  "interpretation_status" TEXT /* Status of the interpretation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interpretation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interpretations_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES variant_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interpretations_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interpretations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "interpretation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interpretation submitted */,
  "number_of_submissions" INTEGER /* Number of times the interpretation has been submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review process */,
  "last_evaluated" TEXT /* Date the submission was last evaluated */,
  "variation_record" TEXT /* Record identifier for the variant condition */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission */,
  "submission_comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the submission process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_interpretation_id FOREIGN KEY ("interpretation_id") REFERENCES interpretations ("interpretation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of criteria */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criteria */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criteria */,
  "criteria_version" INTEGER /* Version of the criteria */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the criteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician) */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "interpretation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interpretation accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the interpretation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the interpretation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_interpretation_id FOREIGN KEY ("interpretation_id") REFERENCES interpretations ("interpretation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "interpretation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interpretation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the interpretation */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_interpretation_id FOREIGN KEY ("interpretation_id") REFERENCES interpretations ("interpretation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic variant */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association between the variant and condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_associations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_associations_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES variant_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic variant */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., VCF, PDF) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_files_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
